Abstract submission deadline extended:

Doğuş University 2nd International Conference on English Language and Literature, 21st Century English Literature

We are very pleased to announce that the abstract submission deadline for DİDE 2024 has been extended to 20 August 2024.

Researchers hoping to participate in the Doğuş University 2nd International Conference on English Language and Literature are encouraged to submit an abstract before the new extended deadline.

Abstracts (about 250 words), with the name of the author, institutional affiliation, contact address (e-mail), and a brief bio-note should be sent to the following address:

[email protected]

Paylaş
